# GitHub Copilot Instructions
# Delegates all project instructions to AGENTS.md.

Follow all instructions in ../AGENTS.md.

## Copilot-Specific Notes
- Inline completions: prioritize Bicep module patterns from infra/bicep/modules/
- Chat: always reference CAF naming convention in AGENTS.md when generating resource names
- Code review: flag any resource name that does not follow the pattern in AGENTS.md
